name: Buttermilk Biscuits 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment or wax paper.
2. In a bowl, combine the dry ingredients and mix thoroughly. Add the butter and blend until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the buttermilk, incorporating it with your fingers or a fork until the dough is smooth and well combined. Avoid overworking the dough.
4. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a circle about 7 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick. Using a small round cookie cutter or the rim of a shot glass, cut out twelve rounds.
5. Place the dough rounds on the prepared baking sheet. Bake until golden brown on top and bottom, approximately 15 minutes.
6. Serve warm. Makes 12 miniature biscuits.
